title: Grow a Garden: Plant Care & Seasonal Farming Basics

questions.q: What happens to your plants if you don't water them regularly?
Which season is best for growing most basic vegetables like carrots and potatoes?
What is the primary purpose of using fertilizer on your crops?
a: To make them grow faster and yield more

questions.q: How often should you typically water most plants in Grow a Garden?
What tool do you need to prepare soil for planting seeds?
Which of these crops is considered rare and difficult to grow?
What happens during the winter season in Grow a Garden?
a: All plants grow twice as fast

questions.q: When is the best time to harvest your crops?
a: As soon as you plant them
When they are fully grown and ripe

questions.q: What can you do with harvested crops in the game?
a: Sell them for coins or use as ingredients
